sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ka Topa aw, Nangma kiangah, lampi haksa paikhawm lai-ah;

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Dahna ka thuak lawmte sita, hih hang na thu ngaihsun
Hih bang gen ding hi’ng, “Na deihna bang hi tahen!”

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Siangtho in keima kha, na awi bang gamta dingin-ah;
Hih bang gen ding hi’ng, “Na deihna

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Nisimin hong puahpha inla, na awi bang gamta ding inah;
ding hong huh in, “Na deihna bang hi tahen!”

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Hih bang gen ding hi’ng, “Na deihna bang hi tahen!”
